app.title: Raffle 2183 (Eshel Hayarden) - Apartment Ranker
app.subtitle: Score your preferences to rank {{count}} apartments

profile.profileTip: A profile stores your scoring preferences, importance weights, manual order, and notes. Create multiple profiles to compare different priorities.
profile.importError_legacy: This file was exported by an older version and is no longer supported. Please re-export it from the previous installation.
profile.importError_newer: This file was exported by a newer version of the app. Please update before importing.
profile.importError_wrong-kind: This file contains multiple profiles. Bulk-import is not supported here — export a single profile instead.
profile.noProfiles: No profiles yet. Create one to get started.

scoring.confirmRound: Round all scores and weights to the nearest integer?
scoring.weightTip: How much does this parameter matter? (1 = not at all, 5 = very important)
scoring.scoreTip: How much do you prefer this value? (1 = dislike, 5 = strongly prefer)
scoring.title: Set Your Preferences
scoring.howToUse: Set the importance (1–5) for each parameter to control how much it affects the ranking. Then score each value (1–5) to express your preference: 1 = dislike, 5 = strongly prefer.

results.resetOrderTip: Discard the manual order and go back to the scored ranking
results.confirmResetOrder: Reset to scored order? This will remove your saved manual order.
results.saveToProfileTip: Save the current manual order to the active profile
results.saveAsProfileTip: Save the current order as a new profile
results.unsavedOrderMessage: You have unsaved changes to the manual order. Would you like to save or discard them before leaving?
results.title: Ranked Apartments
results.howToUse: Browse your ranked apartments. Use the filters to narrow the list, click a row to see full details and add notes, or drag rows to set a manual order.

compare.noProfiles: Create at least 2 profiles to compare
compare.title: Side-by-Side Profile Comparison
compare.howToUse: See how different profiles rank the same apartments side by side. Select up to 3 profiles, then click an apartment in any column to highlight where it ranks in the others.

combine.title: Merge Profiles Into One Ranking
combine.howToUse: Merge several profiles into a single ranking. Select up to 3 profiles and set each one's importance — apartments are ranked by the weighted average of their scores across profiles.
combine.createMergedProfileTip: Save the current combination as a new profile you can edit
combine.lockRanking: Lock current combined ranking as manual order
combine.lockRankingTip: Freeze the ranking you see now into the new profile's manual order, so it matches exactly even after editing scores
combine.mergedCreated: Created merged profile "{{name}}" and switched to it.

changeHistory.allRounded: All scores rounded to nearest integer
changeHistory.manualOrderReset: Manual order reset to scored order

history.title: Change History
history.empty: No changes yet. Start scoring to see your history.
history.confirmRestore: Are you sure? All changes after this point will be discarded.
history.title: Change History
history.howToUse: A log of changes you've made to the active profile's scores and manual order. Click Restore on an earlier entry to revert back to that state.

settings.title: Settings
settings.maxResultsHint: Only show the top N apartments you could get. Leave empty to show all {{total}}.

about.title: About
about.description: A tool for scoring and ranking apartments in Raffle 2183 (Eshel Hayarden) based on your personal preferences.
about.disclaimer: The creator of this tool is not responsible for any mistakes, inaccuracies, or data inconsistencies. Use this tool at your own risk. The creator shall not be held accountable for any decisions made based on the information presented.

welcome.title: Welcome to the Apartment Ranker!
welcome.body: This short tour (about a minute) will walk you through the basics: how to score your preferences, see your ranked results, and compare different priorities. You can replay it anytime from the ? icon in the top bar.

profile.title: Create and manage profiles
profile.body: A profile stores a complete set of scoring preferences — weights, scores, manual order, and notes. Create multiple profiles to compare different priorities, and export/import them to share or back up.

scoring.title: Set your preferences
scoring.body: For each parameter, set how important it is (Importance, 1–5) and score the values you prefer (1 = dislike, 5 = strongly prefer). The ranking updates automatically.

results.title: See your ranked results
results.body: Apartments are ranked from best to worst based on your scores. Use the filters to narrow the list, or drag rows to define a manual order that overrides the score-based ranking.

apartmentRow.title: Explore apartment details
apartmentRow.body: Click any row to expand it and view full details: floor plans, parking, balcony, and more. You can also add personal notes to each apartment.

compare.title: Compare profiles side-by-side
compare.body: Use the Compare tab to view two or three profiles next to each other. Click an apartment in one column to highlight its rank in the others — handy for spotting agreements and disagreements between preferences.

combine.title: Combine profiles into one ranking
combine.body: The Combine tab merges several profiles into a single weighted ranking. Set each profile's importance and see a unified list — great when two people want to agree on a shared shortlist.

done.title: You're all set!
done.body: You'll find Settings, About, and this Help icon in the top bar. Click the ? anytime to replay this tour. Happy ranking!
